title: As Americans Sour on War in Iran, Trump Faces a Tough Sell on Latest Deal

title: Zalando Plunges After German Regulator Starts Accounts Probe
title_cn: 德国监管机构启动账户调查后 Zalando 暴跌
summary: Zalando SE plunged after Germany’s financial regulator said it launched a probe into the online fashion retailer’s 2025 report over a suspected violation of accounting rules.

title: Trump-Backed Golf Resort Advances as Vietnam Seizes Farmland
title_cn: 越南侵占农田，特朗普支持的高尔夫度假村不断发展
summary: Dozens of police moved into the site of northern Vietnam’s $1.5 billion Trump-branded golf resort project shortly after 7 a.m. on Friday, as the first few plots of farmers’ land were officially seized by the state.

title: Indonesia Set to Boost Cash Placed in State Banks to $22 Billion
title_cn: 印度尼西亚计划将国有银行的现金增加至 220 亿美元
summary: The Indonesian government will put an estimated 400 trillion rupiah ($22 billion) of its standby funds in state-owned lenders to keep on fueling economic growth, according to its finance chief.

title: It's All About Intense Rotational Plays Now: 3-Minutes MLIV
title_cn: 现在都是激烈的轮换比赛：3 分钟 MLIV
summary: Anna Edwards, Tom Mackenzie and Ven Ram break down today's key themes for analysts and investors on "Bloomberg: The Opening Trade."  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rory Johnston on Why His $200 Oil Prediction Didn't Turn Out Right
title_cn: 罗里·约翰斯顿 (Rory Johnston) 谈为何他的 200 美元石油预测没有实现
summary: What the Iran War has taught us about the oil market.

title: ECB Says Consumers’ Short-Term Price Expectations Fall Sharply
title_cn: 欧洲央行表示消费者的短期价格预期大幅下降
summary: Inflation expectations among euro-area consumers for the next year fell significantly in May, even before a deal was reached to end the hostilities in the Middle East.

title: Odd Lots: Rory Johnston on Why Oil Didn’t Hit $200 (Podcast)
title_cn: 奇怪的事情：罗里约翰斯顿谈为什么石油没有达到 200 美元（播客）
summary: The Strait of Hormuz has (mostly) re-opened! Crude prices are still up since the start of the war with Iran, but popular predictions earlier this year of $200-a-barrel Brent didn’t pan out. Why is that? We last talked to Rory Johnston, the founder of the Commodity Context newsletter, at the start of the conflict. And in that conversation he said that the Strait’s closure would lead to $200 oil if it persisted for any length of time. Today, he returns to tell us what he’s learned about the oil ma

title: AI Cost Reality Check Hits Asia Tech Stocks as Apple Hikes Price
title_cn: 苹果提高股价，人工智能成本现实检验冲击亚洲科技股
summary: Asian technology stocks slumped after Apple raised prices for its products, stoking concern that rising component costs will curb demand for devices and eventually slow the memory chip rally that has powered much of the AI trade.

title: Stocks Rattled Again by Tech Selloff; Oil Retreats: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 科技股再次遭遇抛售；石油价格回落：市场总结
summary: Technology stocks dragged global indexes lower at the end of a volatile week as renewed selling in the world’s biggest memory chip makers and a possible delay to OpenAI’s public debut hit sentiment.

title: Ebola Puts Spotlight on Trump's America First Health Strategy
title_cn: 埃博拉病毒让特朗普的美国第一健康战略成为焦点
summary: In this edition of Next Africa, we examine how the Donald Trump administration's America First health strategy is changing the landscape of healthcare across Africa as a growing Ebola outbreak spreads through the Democratic Republic of Congo and Uganda. Africa CDC chief Jean Kaseya warns that containing the virus will require more funding, not tighter border controls. Plus, Bloomberg's Jennifer Zabasajja speaks with IAVI CEO Mark Feinberg who says clinical trials of a vaccine could begin by the end of this year. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Horizons Middle East & Africa 6/26/2026
title_cn: 中东和非洲地平线 6/26/2026
summary: Horizons Middle East & Africa is your daily spotlight on one of the world's fastest-growing regions. Live from Dubai, we bring you the latest global markets and analysis, plus news-making interviews, with a special focus on MEA. All that and more, as you head to the office in the Gulf, pause for lunch in Hong Kong, or start your day in London or Johannesburg.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China’s Hardware Tech Stocks Look to Earnings to Sustain Rally
title_cn: 中国硬件科技股依靠盈利来维持涨势
summary: Chinese hardware technology stocks have been on a tear. The next challenge is showing the earnings to back it up.

title: T. Rowe’s Chung Sees Pullback in ‘Expensive’ Yuan After Rally
title_cn: T. Rowe 的 Chung 认为人民币在上涨后将回落
summary: T. Rowe Price is betting on a pullback in the yuan, arguing that it looks “expensive” against a basket of currencies from China’s major trading partners.

title: Navis Explores Sale of Stake in Nuts and Snacks Firm Dan-D Foods
title_cn: Navis 探索出售坚果和零食公司 Dan-D Foods 的股份
summary: Navis Capital Partners is planning to sell its majority stake in nuts and snacks company Dan-D Foods Ltd.

title: China Gives Coal Room to Grow in New Five-Year Energy Plan
title_cn: 中国在新五年能源规划中给予煤炭增长空间
summary: China is leaving room for coal consumption to grow in coming years, as the stability of the world’s largest energy market continues to outweigh climate concerns.

title: Key Kazakh Field Cuts Oil Output After Drones Hit Russian Plant
title_cn: 无人机袭击俄罗斯工厂后哈萨克斯坦主要油田减产
summary: Kazakhstan’s giant Karachaganak oil and gas field cut crude production by more than a quarter after a drone attack forced the shutdown of a processing plant in Russia that handles its gas.

title: Lescure Sticks With 5% French Deficit After Watchdog Rebuke
title_cn: 监管机构斥责后，法国 Lescure 仍维持 5% 赤字
summary: Finance Minister Roland Lescure reaffirmed his commitment to lower France’s deficit after the country’s fiscal watchdog rebuked the government’s pending plans.

title: Emerging Market Stocks Slide Most in Three Weeks on Tech Selloff
title_cn: 科技股抛售导致新兴市场股票三周来跌幅最大
summary: Emerging-market stocks slumped the most in almost three weeks, dragged lower by a global tech selloff that hammered South Korean equities and triggered a 20-minute trading halt.

title: European Natural Gas Edges Higher as Traders Monitor Hormuz Risk
title_cn: 随着交易商监控霍尔木兹风险，欧洲天然气小幅走高
summary: European natural gas prices inched higher after an attack on a cargo ship in the Strait of Hormuz renewed fears about safe passage through the critical waterway.

title: Palm Oil Climbs on Higher Exports and Indian Demand Expectations
title_cn: 棕榈油因出口增加和印度需求预期而攀升
summary: Palm oil advanced on rising Malaysian exports and expectations of better demand from the biggest buyer India as festival season nears.

title: Lundin Oil Executives Accused of Complicity in War Crimes
title_cn: 伦丁石油公司高管被指控犯有战争罪
summary: For one of the first times since Nuremberg, a court is considering whether executives should go to prison for doing business with a brutal government. Lundin Oil’s former chairman Ian Lundin, and Alexandre Schneiter, who was its head of exploration before serving as chief executive officer, are accused of indirectly encouraging atrocities within their concession by the Sudanese military and paramilitary groups. Bloomberg's Simon Marks reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Stanley: Oil Market Complacent over Hormuz
title_cn: 斯坦利：石油市场对霍尔木兹海峡感到满意
summary: There are renewed concerns about safe passage through the Strait of Hormuz after an attack on a cargo ship. Meanwhile, oil was on track for a weekly decline after transits through the Strait accelerated. Matt Stanley, Market Engagement Head at Kpler spoke to Bloomberg’s Abeer Abu Omar on Horizons Middle East and Africa on the market reaction to the waterway’s operation. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gold Hovers Near $4,000 After Soft Inflation Print Slows Decline
title_cn: 疲软通胀放缓导致金价徘徊在 4,000 美元附近
summary: Gold traded either side of $4,000 an ounce on Friday after the latest US inflation print tempered expectations for an interest-rate hike, capping a tumultuous week that saw bullion slump to the lowest since November.

title: Traffic Flows Through Hormuz Despite Shock Container Ship Attack
title_cn: 尽管集装箱船袭击事件令人震惊，但霍尔木兹的交通仍畅通无阻
summary: An attack on a container vessel sailing through the Strait of Hormuz has prompted some shipowners to review exit plans, but traffic continued to flow in both directions through the vital thoroughfare on Friday.

title: A Chip Wreck in Markets: Markets Snapshot
title_cn: 市场崩溃：市场快照
summary: Micron's earnings numbers came at a delicate moment for the AI industry. Shares of chipmakers and other technology companies had been hammered in recent days on fears that a spending boom was faltering. Questions remain on whether the tech sector can mitigate the boom-and-bust cycles that have characterized the industry. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Stellantis, Nissan in Talks to Buy Assets From Marelli
title_cn: Stellantis、日产正在洽谈从马瑞利购买资产
summary: Stellantis NV and Nissan Motor Co. are in talks to take over some of the assets of Marelli Holdings Co., the global auto-parts maker that’s mired in a challenging reorganization in bankruptcy.

title: FTSE 100 Futures Fall as Tech Weakness Hits Sentiment
title_cn: 科技股疲软打击市场情绪，富时 100 指数期货下跌

title: Apple's Price Hikes Shake Tech Sentiment | Insight with Haslinda Amin 06/26/2026
title_cn: 苹果的价格上涨动摇了科技界的情绪哈斯琳达·阿明的见解 06/26/2026
summary: Insight with Haslinda Amin, a daily news program featuring in-depth, high-profile interviews and analysis to give viewers the complete picture on the stories that matter. The show features prominent leaders spanning the worlds of business, finance, politics and culture. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Resumes Decline Even as Ship Attack Clouds Hormuz Outlook
title_cn: 尽管船舶袭击给霍尔木兹海峡前景蒙上阴影，石油价格仍继续下跌
summary: Oil was on track for a weekly decline after transits through the Strait of Hormuz accelerated, although an attack on a cargo ship has renewed concerns about safe passage through the vital waterway.

title: Where to Invest 10 Lakh Rupees Amid a Fragile Recovery
title_cn: 在脆弱的复苏中，100万卢比该投资到哪里
summary:
Indian markets are showing signs of recovery, but volatile oil prices, a delayed monsoon, and uneven stock valuations could eat into those gains.

Against the fragile calm, four financial experts point to investment opportunities. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Omnicom Chief Defends Interpublic Deal as AI Rattles Ad Industry
title_cn: 宏盟首席执行官为人工智能扰乱广告行业的 Interpublic 交易辩护
summary: John Wren, the chief executive officer of ad giant Omnicom Group Inc., said he’s starting to see results after closing the deal for rival Interpublic Group about seven months ago — racking up customer wins and cost savings. He’s still got to convince the market.

title: World Bank, AfDB to Boost African Electrification Plan This Year
title_cn: 世界银行和非洲开发银行今年将推动非洲电气化计划
summary: The World Bank and African Development Bank plan to accelerate their program to bring electricity to hundreds of millions of Africans this year by approving new projects, investing in Eritrea and promoting the development of regional power pools.

title: European Stocks Slip on Renewed Tech Woes; Zalando Slumps
title_cn: 欧洲股市因新一轮科技困境而下滑；扎兰多暴跌
summary: European shares dropped from a record as jitters resurfaced over overvalued technology stocks.

title: SoftBank Shares Tumble After Report of OpenAI’s IPO Delay
title_cn: OpenAI IPO 延迟报道后软银股价暴跌
summary: SoftBank Group Corp.’s stock fell the most since August 2024 on concerns that OpenAI may hold off on an initial public offering until next year and delay returns for its Japanese backer.

title: Korean Stocks Plunge 9% on Chip Selloff
title_cn: 芯片抛售导致韩国股市暴跌 9%
summary: South Korean stocks were hit by a second trading suspension this week as chipmakers plunged, highlighting the market’s sensitivity to swings in global artificial-intelligence sentiment. The benchmark Kospi extended losses after the Korea Exchange’s 20 minute trading halt, falling as much as 9%. Bloomberg's Anthony Stephens reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Southern Italy Drives Economic Growth
title_cn: 意大利南部推动经济增长
summary: Naples is leading a regional revival in Italy, fueled by European Union cash and investments in technology and infrastructure. The economy of the Campania region, where Naples is located, grew 0.9% last year, outstripping the 0.7% in Milan’s province of Lombardy and well ahead of the 0.5% national average, according to Bank of Italy data. Bloomberg's Alessandra Migliaccio reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The AI Trade Is No Longer About Owning One Thing: Taking Stock
title_cn: 人工智能交易不再是拥有一件事：盘点
summary: The case for the artificial-intelligence trade remains intact, but the risk of getting it wrong has risen considerably. This week showed just how unforgiving the theme has become.

title: Apple Shares Fall After Prices Increase for Macs, iPads
title_cn: Mac、iPad 价格上涨后苹果股价下跌
summary: Apple Inc. shares fell after it raised prices of all Macs, iPads, home devices and the Vision Pro to offset cost hikes caused by a shortage of memory chips and storage. The price increases are in effect globally and are largely unprecedented, with no equivalent in the company's modern history of sweeping hikes across much of its product line. Bloomberg's Neil Campling reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Will Gamers Ignore GTA VI’s Hefty $80 Price Tag?
title_cn: 玩家会忽视 GTA VI 高达 80 美元的标价吗？
summary:
Grand Theft Auto VI’s $79.99 launch price marks a new high for mainstream video games and signals a potential shift in industry pricing power. This segment examines how Rockstar’s strategy could reshape revenue models and consumer expectations.
Joost van Dreunen, NYU Stern Adjunct Assistant Professor and author of One Up: Creativity, Competition, and the Global Business of Video Games, joined Paul Allen on Insight with Haslinda Amin to discuss the implications. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SemiAnalysis Xie on Asia AI Supply Chain
title_cn: 谢半分析谈亚洲人工智能供应链
summary:
Myron Xie, AI supply chain research lead at SemiAnalysis, explains who, within Asia's 
hardware suppliers, are standing out as the winners in the market's surge in AI demand.
He speaks with Shery Ahn on Bloomberg Tech: Asia. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: State Street: Asia May Win in AI Boom
title_cn: 道富银行：亚洲可能在人工智能繁荣中获胜
summary: Ninghui Liu, Head of APAC Investment Strategy and Research at State Street Investment Management, discusses why he thinks Asia may be the biggest beneficiary in the global AI boom. He speaks with Shery Ahn on Bloomberg Tech: Asia. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Korean Stocks Tumble 9% on Chip Selloff, Triggers Trading Halt
title_cn: 韩国股市因芯片抛售而暴跌 9%，引发交易暂停
summary: South Korean stocks were hit by a second trading suspension this week as chipmakers plunged, highlighting the market’s sensitivity to swings in global artificial-intelligence sentiment.

title: More Expensive iPhones on the Horizon?
title_cn: 更昂贵的iPhone即将问世？
summary: Bloomberg Intelligence says Apple has to hike prices for its iPhones after raising prices for its Macs, iPads and home devices. Those hikes went into effect globally on Thursday. Bloomberg Intelligence Senior Technology Analyst Anurag Rana spoke with Bloomberg's Yvonne Man and Avril Hong on "Bloomberg: The China Show." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: GCash Owner Seeks Up to $1.5 Billion in Record Philippine IPO
title_cn: GCash 所有者寻求高达 15 亿美元的菲律宾首次公开募股
summary: The company behind the Philippines’ biggest mobile wallet GCash is preparing what may become the country’s biggest initial public offering ever, seeking to raise as much as 92.3 billion pesos ($1.5 billion).

title: Samsung, SK Hynix Reportedly Preparing Huge AI Spending Push
title_cn: 据报道，三星和 SK 海力士准备大力推动人工智能支出
summary: Samsung Electronics Co. and SK Hynix Inc. are preparing to announce hundreds of billions of dollars worth in new investments on Monday, according to South Korean media reports this week.

title: Drone Startup Elroy Air Is Said to Near $800 Million SPAC Deal
title_cn: 无人机初创公司 Elroy Air 据称将完成近 8 亿美元的 SPAC 交易
summary: Elroy Air Inc., a cargo drone startup aiming to replace delivery trucks, is in advanced talks to go public through a merger with a blank-check vehicle that will create a company with an enterprise value of about $1 billion.

title: Apple Supplier Lingyi Rises in HK After $1.1 Billion Debut
title_cn: 苹果供应商灵一在香港上市，估值达 11 亿美元
summary: Lingyi iTech Guangdong Co. a Chinese electronic supplier for Apple Inc. and Tesla Inc., rose in its Hong Kong debut after raising HK$8.3 billion ($1.06 billion) in a share sale, part of the city’s busiest month for listings this year.

title: Trump Administration Asks OpenAI to Stagger AI Model Release
title_cn: 特朗普政府要求 OpenAI 错开人工智能模型发布时间
summary: The Trump administration has asked OpenAI to stagger the release of an upcoming powerful artificial intelligence model, according to a person familiar with the matter, nearly two weeks after rival Anthropic PBC suspended its most capable offerings from the market under regulatory pressure.

title: Musk Starts Expanding X Payments to More Users After Delay
title_cn: 延迟后，马斯克开始向更多用户扩展 X 支付
summary: Elon Musk is expanding access to digital payment venture X Money to a subset of premium users on social network X, part of his bid to turn the platform into an “everything app.”

title: H.B. Fuller Agrees to Acquire UK-Listed AMS for £659 Million
title_cn: H.B.富勒同意以 6.59 亿英镑收购英国上市公司 AMS
summary: H.B. Fuller Co. agreed to acquire Advanced Medical Solutions Group Plc, a British maker of tissue-healing medical products, for £659 million ($870 million).

title: Pentagon Sees Bigger Role for AI in Setting Military Targets
title_cn: 五角大楼认为人工智能在设定军事目标方面发挥着更大作用
summary: The Pentagon has quietly revised its doctrine on how the US military picks its targets in battle, opening the way for artificial intelligence to make critical wartime decisions in the future.

title: Consumer Side of AI Currently Underweighted, Says Mark Pincus
title_cn: 马克·平卡斯 (Mark Pincus) 表示，人工智能的消费者方面目前权重偏低
summary: Zynga founder Mark Pincus said that the consumer side of AI is being underweighted in comparison to the engineering and coding aspects of the technology and that capping the consumer influence is not in line with the the way the internet has developed. Pincus said that while most of AI is still a 'single player experience,' it is going to massively change our labor market and economy as it further develops. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Consumer is Feeling 'A Lot of Pressure' But Bed Bath & Beyond Sees Upside
title_cn: 消费者感到“很大的压力”，但 Bed Bath & Beyond 看到了好处
summary: Amy Sullivan, CEO of Bed Bath & Beyond, said that consumers are feeling 'a lot of pressure' but that company's outlook is that if they can do business at a low point there is a high upside to come. Sullivan also talked about Bed Bath & Beyond's efforts to engage with consumers, including a new sweepstakes around the company's iconic coupons.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: OpenAI Leans Toward Waiting Until 2027 for IPO, NYT Says
title_cn: 《纽约时报》称 OpenAI 倾向于等到 2027 年进行 IPO
summary: OpenAI is leaning toward holding off on an initial public offering until 2027, the New York Times reported, citing three people involved in the company’s deliberations.

title: Chipmaker Onsemi to Buy Synaptics in $6 Billion Stock Deal
title_cn: 芯片制造商 Onsemi 将以 60 亿美元的股票交易收购 Synaptics
summary: US chipmaker Onsemi has agreed to buy Synaptics Inc., a firm that specializes in semiconductors for smart devices, in an all-stock deal that values the company at about $6.2 billion.

title: Why South Korea’s AI Stock Mania Is a Warning
title_cn: 为什么韩国的人工智能股票狂热是一个警告
summary:
South Korea’s stock market has surged about 200% year-on-year, powered by an AI-fueled chip rally. But extreme volatility and heavy reliance on two companies may mean it’s a bubble waiting to burst. 
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Tenstorrent CEO on Next Leg of AI Tech, Deal Interest
title_cn: Tenstorrent 首席执行官谈人工智能技术的下一步以及交易兴趣
summary: Tenstorrent CEO Jim Keller discusses AI buildout and what’s next for chips. He speaks with Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld on “The Close.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple Podcasts’ Video Push Shows Early Promise
title_cn: 苹果播客的视频推送显示出早期的希望
summary: Apple charged into video podcasts earlier this year after ceding market share to YouTube. Shows that opted in early are cautiously optimistic about the results.

title: Zelenskyy Orders Push to End War as Russia Attacked by Drones
title_cn: 俄罗斯遭到无人机袭击，泽连斯基下令结束战争
summary: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy approved a 40-day “influence operation” to convince the Kremlin to end the war, as Russia said several regions were attacked in one of Kyiv’s most intense drone strikes in more than four years of war.

title: Burnham Inherits an Economy That’s Just Starting to Look Up
title_cn: 伯纳姆继承了一个刚刚开始好转的经济
summary: As Keir Starmer was reeling from heavy local election losses last month, it was hard to see why anyone would be trying to take over the embattled prime minister’s job.

title: US Envoy to Italy Praises Meloni, Downplays Trump Spat
title_cn: 美国驻意大利特使赞扬梅洛尼，淡化特朗普的口角
summary: The US ambassador to Italy moved to further ease tensions between the two allies, saying relations are “fine” in the aftermath of a public clash between Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni and President Donald Trump.

title: Bayer’s Supreme Court Win in Roundup Case No ‘Silver Bullet’
title_cn: 拜耳最高法院在农达案中获胜，没有“银弹”
summary: After years of legal setbacks that have cost billions of dollars over its top-selling Roundup weedkiller, Bayer AG finally got a resounding win in the biggest tribunal of all.

title: Tech Stocks Selloff After Apple Price Hikes, OpenAI IPO Report | Daybreak Europe 6/26/2026
title_cn: 苹果股价上涨、OpenAI IPO 报告导致科技股遭遇抛售黎明欧洲 6/26/2026
summary:
Bloomberg Daybreak Europe is your essential morning viewing to stay ahead. Live from London, we set the agenda for your day, catching you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. And we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

Global stocks slumped to a two-week low in a rapid reversal from Thursday’s jump, when Micron Technology's bullish forecast and a US-listing planned by SK Hynix boosted optimism over the sustainability of the AI trade. 

Apple shares fell after it raised prices of all Macs, iPads, home devices and the Vision Pro on Thursday. Sentiment was also dragged lower by a report that OpenAI may hold off on an initial public offering until next year.

And oil was on track for a weekly decline after transits through the Strait of Hormuz accelerated, although an attack on a cargo ship has renewed concerns about safe passage through the vital waterway. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Japan’s Lower House Passes Bill Banning National Flag Vandalism
title_cn: 日本众议院通过禁止破坏国旗的法案
summary: Japan’s lower house passed a bill banning the desecration of the national flag, highlighting Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi’s efforts to win over the growing ranks of conservative voters.

title: Johannesburg Collapse Risk Spurs Call for State to Run City
title_cn: 约翰内斯堡崩溃风险促使人们呼吁国家管理城市
summary: South Africa’s government may soon need to make the politically fraught decision to take control of Johannesburg to avert the city’s financial collapse, according to a consultant appointed by two of the country’s leading business groups.

title: Steve Hilton: Trump Isn’t on California Ballot
title_cn: 史蒂夫·希尔顿：特朗普不在加州选票上
summary: The Republican candidate for governor of California and former UK political adviser on the race, the state’s challenges and Donald Trump’s endorsement. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Supertankers Turn Back Again From Strait of Hormuz
title_cn: 超级油轮再次从霍尔木兹海峡返回
summary: A ship was hit by an unidentified projectile in the Strait of Hormuz, marking a setback to efforts to restore traffic through the vital energy thoroughfare. Bloomberg's Abeer Abu Omar has the latest. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Israel Keeps Grip on Lebanon as Beirut Eyes Hezbollah-Free Zone
title_cn: 贝鲁特着眼于无真主党区，以色列继续控制黎巴嫩
summary: The Israeli and Lebanese governments are discussing locations for US-proposed areas in southern Lebanon where the Beirut government could prove its ability to keep out Hezbollah.

title: Ship Struck in Hormuz as Oil Supertankers Turn Back Again
title_cn: 超级油轮再次返航，霍尔木兹发生船舶碰撞
summary: A ship was hit by an unidentified projectile in the Strait of Hormuz on Thursday in the first reported attack since an interim US-Iran peace deal, marking a setback to efforts to restore traffic through the vital energy thoroughfare.

title: Naples Outpaces Milan as Southern Italy Drives Economic Growth
title_cn: 意大利南部推动经济增长 那不勒斯超越米兰
summary: The south has historically lagged the north — but that’s changing.

title: North Korea Readies Beach Resort for More Tourists After Xi Trip
title_cn: 朝鲜在习主席访问后准备海滩度假村以迎接更多游客
summary: North Korean leader Kim Jong Un inspected a new train station at a beach resort on the country’s east coast, weeks after Xi Jinping pledged deeper tourism ties between the two countries.

title: Sherritt Warns of Going-Concern Risk After Trump Cuba Sanctions
title_cn: 谢里特警告特朗普制裁古巴后存在持续经营风险
summary: A Canadian miner that is one of Cuba’s biggest foreign investors warned investors that its ability to carry on as a going concern is in doubt after Donald Trump expanded US sanctions on the Caribbean nation.

title: Vance Says Nixon Watergate Scandal Wouldn’t End a Presidency Now
title_cn: 万斯表示尼克松水门丑闻不会立即结束总统任期
summary: Vice President JD Vance called it “crazy” that the Watergate scandal toppled Richard Nixon’s presidency, saying it would have barely registered in today’s political environment.

title: Indonesia Opens Door to Dirty Money to Fund Prabowo’s Plans
title_cn: 印度尼西亚向脏钱敞开大门，资助普拉博沃的计划
summary: Indonesia is dangling unprecedented legal protections for investors in President Prabowo Subianto’s sovereign wealth fund, a move analysts warn could attract money with questionable origins and further erode the reputation of Southeast Asia’s largest economy.

title: Trump Plans First Flight on Qatar-Gifted Air Force One Next Week
title_cn: 特朗普计划下周乘坐卡塔尔赠送的空军一号进行首次飞行
summary: Donald Trump is expected to take his first trip on the new US presidential plane gifted by the Qatari government when he travels to an event in North Dakota on July 1, according to White House officials.

title: Trump Blocks Housing Bill Until SAVE Act is Passed | Balance of Power: Late Edition 06/25/2026
title_cn: 特朗普阻止住房法案，直至 SAVE 法案获得通过权力平衡：最新版 06/25/2026
summary:
"Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, Rep. Bryan Steil, a Wisconsin Republican, says he believes the bipartisan housing bill President Trump delayed signing will ultimately be enacted, citing overwhelming support in Congress. Joe LaVorgna, SMBC Americas Chief Economist and former Counselor to Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent, says the Fed will not cut rates and may need to raise them as PCE inflation rises to a three-year high. Democratic Rep. Sean Casten of Illinois says he is "very encouraged" House Speaker Mike Johnson will send President Donald Trump the bipartisan housing bill, arguing the move suggests Johnson is standing up to Trump as the president's poll numbers fall.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Lutnick Delayed Canada Bridge Debut to Seek Bigger Cut of Toll Revenue
title_cn: 卢特尼克推迟了加拿大大桥的开通，以寻求更大的通行费收入削减
summary: Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick intervened to delay the opening of a new bridge between the US and Canada and is pressing to renegotiate the deal for a larger share of toll revenue, people familiar with the matter said.

title: US Sanctions Rwandan Refinery in Congo Gold Smuggling Network
title_cn: 美国制裁刚果黄金走私网络中的卢旺达炼油厂
summary: The US has sanctioned Rwanda’s Gasabo Gold Refinery Ltd. for fueling conflict by processing gold stolen from eastern Democratic Republic of Congo.

title: Rep. Casten: Encouraged by Johnson Move on Housing Bill
title_cn: 众议员卡斯滕：受到约翰逊住房法案举措的鼓励
summary: Democratic Rep. Sean Casten of Illinois says he is "very encouraged" House Speaker Mike Johnson will send President Donald Trump the bipartisan housing bill, arguing the move suggests Johnson is standing up to Trump as the president's poll numbers fall. Rep. Casten also says he is not yet a "hell no" on Trump's Iran supplemental request, but says that while he has not reviewed the full bill, he is not confident it addresses "real problems." He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Taps Chris Klomp as No. 2 Official at RFK Jr.’s HHS
title_cn: 特朗普任命克里斯·克洛普为小罗伯特·肯尼迪卫生与公众服务部二号官员
summary: President Donald Trump formally nominated the top aide to Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. as the department’s deputy secretary in a social media post on Thursday.

title: LaVorgna: Fed May Need to Raise Rates
title_cn: 拉沃尔尼亚：美联储可能需要加息
summary: Joe LaVorgna, SMBC Americas Chief Economist and former Counselor to Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent, says the Fed will not cut rates and may need to raise them as PCE inflation rises to a three-year high. LaVorgna says a resilient labor market could lead workers to press for higher wages, adding to inflation pressure, and calls Trump’s Fed chair pick Kevin Warsh “a great pick.” He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg’s “Balance of Power.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rep. Steil: Housing Bill Will Become Law Despite Delay
title_cn: 众议员斯泰尔：尽管延迟，住房法案仍将成为法律
summary: Rep. Bryan Steil, a Wisconsin Republican, says he believes the bipartisan housing bill President Trump delayed signing will ultimately be enacted, citing overwhelming support in Congress. Steil says he supports the SAVE America Act, but notes there are other ways to pursue the President's election goals, including updating the REAL ID Act. He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg’s “Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: FDA Commissioner Shortlist Includes New York Cancer Practice CEO
title_cn: FDA 专员入围名单包括纽约癌症实践首席执行官
summary: Jeff Vacirca, a physician and leader of a prominent New York oncology group, is among the final candidates the Trump administration is considering to lead the Food and Drug Administration, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Family Feud Poses Fresh Risk to Flavio Bolsonaro’s Brazil Presidential Bid
title_cn: 家族不和给弗拉维奥·博尔索纳罗竞选巴西总统带来新风险
summary: Brazil’s most prominent conservative family is feuding again, posing fresh risks to the presidential candidacy of Flávio Bolsonaro just when it seemed he had an opening to hit leftist leader Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva.

title: US Army Bases to Host Critical Minerals Processing Plants
title_cn: 美国陆军基地将设立关键矿物加工厂
summary: The US Army struck deals with several companies to build critical minerals processing plants on military bases around the country, a first-of-its-kind initiative by the Trump administration to boost domestic production of key materials.

title: Trump Urges Republican Allies to Stop Legislative Blockade
title_cn: 特朗普敦促共和党盟友停止立法封锁
summary: President Donald Trump urged his party to unite around his agenda following a Thursday meeting with House Speaker Mike Johnson intended to defuse escalating tensions between the White House and congressional Republicans.
